candidate: Current-stack global chain candidate_budget=5 acceptance-density diagnostic

workload.suite: llama.cpp mtp-bench prompt suite, raw prompt render

b4_attempt.command: PROMPT_TOKENS=$(cat /tmp/quicksort-prompt-tokens.txt); HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 HIPENGINE_HIP_ARCH=gfx1100 HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt HIPENGINE_MTP_DRAFT_VOCAB_CAP=32768 PYTHONPATH=. timeout 1800 python3 scripts/mtp_chain_e2e_smoke.py --model /models/hipengine/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-PARO-full4096-e5-packed-MTP-BF16 --prompt-tokens "$PROMPT_TOKENS" --decode-tokens 32 --candidate-budget 4 --proposal-impl persistent_device --backend hip_gfx1100 --chain-attn-mode decode_batched --graph-mode off --json /tmp/hipengine-mtp-b4-current-quicksort-smoke-20260612.json
b4_attempt.error: ValueError: candidate_budget must be one of (1, 2, 3, 5)

quicksort_b5_smoke.command: PROMPT_TOKENS=$(cat /tmp/quicksort-prompt-tokens.txt); HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 HIPENGINE_HIP_ARCH=gfx1100 HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt HIPENGINE_MTP_DRAFT_VOCAB_CAP=32768 PYTHONPATH=. timeout 1800 python3 scripts/mtp_chain_e2e_smoke.py --model /models/hipengine/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-PARO-full4096-e5-packed-MTP-BF16 --prompt-tokens "$PROMPT_TOKENS" --decode-tokens 32 --candidate-budget 5 --proposal-impl persistent_device --backend hip_gfx1100 --chain-attn-mode decode_batched --graph-mode off --json /tmp/hipengine-mtp-b5-current-quicksort-smoke-20260612.json

suite_command: HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 HIPENGINE_HIP_ARCH=gfx1100 HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt HIPENGINE_MTP_DRAFT_VOCAB_CAP=32768 PYTHONPATH=. timeout 10800 python3 scripts/mtp_prompt_suite_economics.py --model /models/hipengine/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-PARO-full4096-e5-packed-MTP-BF16 --decode-tokens 32 --candidate-budgets 3,5 --runs 1 --proposal-impl persistent_device --backend hip_gfx1100 --hip-arch gfx1100 --chain-attn-mode decode_batched --graph-mode off --raw-root /tmp/hipengine-mtp-b3-b5-current-9prompt-d32 --out /tmp/hipengine-mtp-b3-b5-current-9prompt-d32.json
decision_reason: B=5 is exact on quicksort and exact 9/9 on the prompt suite, but global B=5 is slower than B=3 on every prompt and in aggregate. The extra verifier row increases suite wall by 6.26 ms/cycle and cycle cost by 0.694 AR tokens while visible density rises only 0.209 tokens/cycle, dropping actual speedup from 0.926x to 0.773x. Keep B=3 as the retained global budget; higher-B work needs adaptive/per-prompt policy or deeper proposer quality, not a default budget increase.
